verses.latin_vulgate: In Domino confido ; quomodo dicitis animæ meæ :  Transmigra in montem sicut passer ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ לְדָ֫וִ֥ד בַּֽיהֹוָ֨ה ׀ חָסִ֗יתִי אֵ֭יךְ תֹּאמְר֣וּ לְנַפְשִׁ֑י (נודו) [נ֝֗וּדִי] הַרְכֶ֥ם צִפּֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: In the Lord put I my trust: how say ye to my soul, Flee as a bird to your mountain?

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam ecce peccatores intenderunt arcum ;  paraverunt sagittas suas in pharetra,  ut sagittent in obscuro rectos corde :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י הִנֵּ֪ה הָרְשָׁעִ֡ים יִדְרְכ֬וּן קֶ֗שֶׁת כּוֹנְנ֣וּ חִצָּ֣ם עַל־יֶ֑תֶר לִיר֥וֹת בְּמוֹ־אֹ֝֗פֶל לְיִשְׁרֵי־לֵֽב׃
verses.king_james: For, lo, the wicked bend their bow, they make ready their arrow upon the string, that they may privily shoot at the upright in heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam quæ perfecisti destruxerunt ;  justus autem, quid fecit ?
verses.king_james: If the foundations be destroyed, what can the righteous do?

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus in templo sancto suo ;  Dominus in cælo sedes ejus.  Oculi ejus in pauperem respiciunt ;  palpebræ ejus interrogant filios hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֤ה ׀ בְּֽהֵ֘יכַ֤ל קׇדְשׁ֗וֹ יְהֹוָה֮ בַּשָּׁמַ֢יִם כִּ֫סְא֥וֹ עֵינָ֥יו יֶחֱז֑וּ עַפְעַפָּ֥יו יִ֝בְחֲנ֗וּ בְּנֵ֣י אָדָֽם׃
verses.king_james: The Lord is in his holy temple, the Lord’s throne is in heaven: his eyes behold, his eyelids try, the children of men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus interrogat justum et impium ;  qui autem diligit iniquitatem, odit animam suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָה֮ צַדִּ֢יק יִ֫בְחָ֥ן וְ֭רָשָׁע וְאֹהֵ֣ב חָמָ֑ס שָֽׂנְאָ֥ה נַפְשֽׁוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The Lord trieth the righteous: but the wicked and him that loveth violence his soul hateth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pluet super peccatores laqueos ;  ignis et sulphur, et spiritus procellarum, pars calicis eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַמְטֵ֥ר עַל־רְשָׁעִ֗ים פַּ֫חִ֥ים אֵ֣שׁ וְ֭גׇפְרִית וְר֥וּחַ זִלְעָפ֗וֹת מְנָ֣ת כּוֹסָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Upon the wicked he shall rain snares, fire and brimstone, and an horrible tempest: this shall be the portion of their cup.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam justus Dominus, et justitias dilexit :  æquitatem vidit vultus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־צַדִּ֣יק יְ֭הֹוָה צְדָק֣וֹת אָהֵ֑ב יָ֝שָׁ֗ר יֶחֱז֥וּ פָנֵֽימוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: For the righteous Lord loveth righteousness; his countenance doth behold the upright.
